experiment_title: 过氧化钠与水反应及产物性质检验实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="过氧化钠与水反应及产物性质检验实验" goal="检验过氧化钠与水反应生成的气体及溶液的酸碱性，并观察反应的放热现象" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="spatula_1" type="spatula" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder_1" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="wooden_stick_1" type="wooden_stick" />
      <Component id="ph_paper_1" type="ph_paper" />
      <Component id="glass_rod_1" type="glass_rod" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Sodium_Peroxide" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="Na2O2" mass="1.5 g" tool="spatula_1" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="H2O" volume="1.5 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder_1" id="step_1" />
      <Insert tool="wooden_stick_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_2" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_4" />
      <Insert tool="glass_rod_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="5s" id="step_6" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="glass_rod_1" to_vessel="ph_paper_1" volume="0.05 mL" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_8" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 在试管中加入过氧化钠和水，观察反应现象（如放热、气体产生），并用木条检验气体性质。
用玻璃棒蘸取反应后溶液，滴在pH试纸上，检验溶液的酸碱性。
